$metadata.goal: Rules for automated design review against Figma node data.

globalRules.message: Use approved semantic color tokens. Unregistered colors require needs-review or raw-exception status.
globalRules.autofixSuggestion: Map to the closest semantic token by usage, not only by visual similarity.

globalRules.message: Transparent variables must preserve base color and opacity separately.
globalRules.autofixSuggestion: Represent as base + opacity + css rgba.

globalRules.message: Use approved spacing scale: 2, 4, 6, 8, 12, 16, 20. Values 1, 3, 7, 9, 10 are component exceptions.
globalRules.autofixSuggestion: Promote only repeated cross-component values after review.
Default controls should use radius.lg 8px unless component spec says otherwise.

globalRules.message: 8px text is allowed only for non-critical badges and needs accessibility review.
globalRules.autofixSuggestion: Prefer typography.caption 10px for readable meta text.

globalRules.message: Use whole-pixel values for frame/component dimensions, spacing, padding, and radius. Fractional pixels usually indicate accidental resizing or misalignment.
globalRules.autofixSuggestion: Round to the nearest intended integer token or documented component value. Ignore vector/icon internals unless they affect layout containers.

globalRules.message: Interactive components must define default, hover, active/pressed, disabled when applicable.
globalRules.autofixSuggestion: Add missing variant states before handoff.

globalRules.message: Keyboard-focusable controls need a documented focus-visible style, even if Figma currently lacks one.

componentRules.autofixSuggestion: Reset component instance dimensions or document the override as responsive behavior.
